nasb.text: I said, “What is it?” And he said, “This is the ephah going forth.” Again he said, “This is their appearance in all the land

esv.text: And I said, “What is it?” He said, “This is the basket that is going out.” And he said, “This is their iniquity in all the land.”

cnv.text: 我說：“這是甚麼？”他回答：“這出來的是個量器。”他又說：“這是他們在全地上的罪孽。”

ccb.text: 我问道：“这是什么？”他说：“这是一个量器。”接着他又说：“里面盛着世人的罪。”
